title: sherbournia hapalophylla subsp. wernhamiana
intro: Sherbournia hapalophylla subsp. wernhamiana, also known as Sherbournia wernhamiana, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Sherbournia hapalophylla subsp. wernhamiana are numerous and include the treatment of various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its analgesic and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
